get.description: Fleet-wide status counts for the Accounts page tiles (all pages, not one).

post.description: Re-probe @SpamBot for one account and return the fresh, cached verdict.
Create a new account from a bare phone number, ready for request-code.
Send a Telegram login code to the account's phone (re-auth by code).
Complete sign-in with the SMS code (+ optional 2FA password).
Log the account out server-side and mark it unauthorized.
Log out and wipe the local session token so the next login is clean.

get.description:
Live profile (name / bio / photos / stories / music) for the edit modal.

``refresh=true`` (the modal's «Обновить» button) bypasses the read cache and
re-pulls from Telegram.
Operator-graduated accounts (the warming page's "Прогретые аккаунты" card).

post.description: Graduate an account: stop warming + flag it for the neurocomment pool.
Reverse a graduation: clear the promotion flag (the warmed card's «вернуть»).

get.description: Recent inter-account warming messages, newest first, for the live feed.

post.description:
Pin a campaign account to one channel (``channel: null`` clears the pin).

A pinned account comments only on that channel; an unpinned one serves all
campaign channels. Returns the refreshed board so the SPA re-renders the card.

delete.description: Delete a campaign and all its serving links, channels, and comments.

post.description: Detach a channel from a campaign (frees its slot for another campaign).

put.description: Replace a campaign's generation prompt (the edit-prompt modal).

post.description: Turn the campaign's challenge (captcha) solver on/off.

Operator retry of one challenged (account, channel) pair (the captcha «Решить»).

Re-onboards the pair (re-running the solver) — account+channel scoped, so it
is campaign-agnostic.

get.description: Recent unsolved bot-challenges across the campaign's channels (captcha queue).
Recent unsolved bot-challenges for one channel — the work-view drill-down (#148).

post.description: Operator "Skip channel for this account": the engine never selects the pair (#148).
Per-campaign run/pause: flip a campaign between active and paused (#148).
Pause the runtime: unsubscribe but keep the remembered listener account.
Remove the listener ("снять слушателя"): unsubscribe and forget the account.

AccountChannelOnboarding.title: AccountChannelOnboarding
AccountChannelOnboarding.description:
Outcome of preparing one account to comment on one channel.

``reason`` carries a short human note for the non-``ready`` states (the
flood-wait detail, the failing error type, etc.).

AccountChannelReadiness.title: AccountChannelReadiness
AccountChannelReadiness.description: One channel's readiness summary on an account card.

AccountProfileView.title: AccountProfileView
AccountProfileView.description: JSON-safe live profile for the edit-profile modal.

AccountStats.title: AccountStats
AccountStats.description:
Fleet-wide status roll-up for the Accounts page stat tiles.

Counts span the whole ``accounts`` table (a single grouped SQL query), not
the currently-loaded page, so the tiles stay correct across pagination. The
buckets mirror the design's status vocabulary (``accountDesignStatus``):

- ``active``    — ``alive``.
- ``idle``      — ``flood_wait`` (spam-limited, the "idle" tile).
- ``needs_code`` — ``unauthorized`` / ``new`` (re-auth by login code).
- ``problem``   — every other non-alive status (banned / session / errors).

AddChannelsRequest.title: AddChannelsRequest
AddChannelsRequest.description: Raw user input — one or many links/usernames, newline- or comma-separated.

AssignAccountRequest.title: AssignAccountRequest
AssignAccountRequest.description: Assign an account to a campaign (the campaign id is the route path param).

CampaignCreate.title: CampaignCreate
CampaignCreate.description: User input to open a campaign — the product mention lives in the prompt.

CampaignList.title: CampaignList
CampaignList.description: Wrapper so callers never receive a raw list (non-negotiable #2).

ChallengeOutcomeCounts.title: ChallengeOutcomeCounts
ChallengeOutcomeCounts.description: The four header counters over the challenge audit table for a time window (#148).

ChallengeRow.title: ChallengeRow
ChallengeRow.description: One persisted challenge audit row, as the operator drill-down reads it.

ChallengeRowList.title: ChallengeRowList
ChallengeRowList.description: Wrapper so the repo returns a model, never a raw list (non-negotiable #2).

ChannelLinkOutcome.title: ChannelLinkOutcome
ChannelLinkOutcome.description:
Result of attaching a channel to a campaign.

``already_assigned`` means the channel is the active target of another campaign
(the repository's uniqueness guard). The service returns this instead of letting
``ChannelAlreadyAssignedError`` reach the UI, so features never catch internals (#2).

DialogueFeed.title: DialogueFeed
DialogueFeed.description: Recent inter-account messages, newest first — the live conversation feed.

DialogueFeedMessage.title: DialogueFeedMessage
DialogueFeedMessage.description:
One dialogue message with both accounts resolved to display labels.

Locale-neutral (#12): ``from_label``/``to_label`` are the account's own
phone / label / id strings, never translated UI text; ``created_at`` is the
stored ISO-8601 timestamp. The SPA owns any presentation.

LinkChannelRequest.title: LinkChannelRequest
LinkChannelRequest.description: Attach a channel to a campaign (the campaign id is the route path param).

LogEntry.title: LogEntry
LogEntry.description: One row of the ``logs`` SQLite table.

NeurocommentAccountCard.title: NeurocommentAccountCard
NeurocommentAccountCard.description: Per-account card in the work view: limits, health, last activity.

NeurocommentBoard.title: NeurocommentBoard
NeurocommentBoard.description: Bulk read model for the work view of one campaign.

NeurocommentCampaign.title: NeurocommentCampaign
NeurocommentCampaign.description:
One row of ``neurocomment_campaigns``.

``channel_count`` / ``account_count`` are populated on the campaigns-list payload
so every card (not just the selected one) can show real link counts; they are 0
on a bare row read (``fetch_campaign``).

NeurocommentChannelRow.title: NeurocommentChannelRow
NeurocommentChannelRow.description: Per-channel row: aggregate status derived from readiness + linked group.

NeurocommentRuntimeStatus.title: NeurocommentRuntimeStatus
NeurocommentRuntimeStatus.description:
Fleet-wide runtime state for the page's running indicator + live animation.

``running`` is the single source of truth the UI animates on: it reflects the
persisted ``listener_running`` flag (the engine is actively subscribed), NOT
merely whether an account is remembered. ``listener_account_id`` is the
*remembered* listener and is returned even when ``running`` is False — that is a
PAUSED runtime, and the SPA keeps the listener strip visible (distinct from "no
listener", where the field is null). ``active_channels`` is the size of the
watch set across all active campaigns (populated only while running).
``log_limit`` is the operator-configured activity-log row cap the SPA reads
instead of hardcoding one (from ``settings.neurocomment.log_limit``).

max_comments_per_channel_per_day.title: Max Comments Per Channel Per Day

NeurocommentSettings.title: NeurocommentSettings
NeurocommentSettings.description: Operator-editable neurocomment limits — the engine reads these at selection.

max_comments_per_channel_per_day.title: Max Comments Per Channel Per Day

NeurocommentSettingsUpdate.title: NeurocommentSettingsUpdate
NeurocommentSettingsUpdate.description: Caller-supplied neurocomment-settings change from the Settings screen.

PhoneCodeRequestResult.title: PhoneCodeRequestResult
PhoneCodeRequestResult.description: API response after a code is sent — confirmation only, no secrets.

PromoteRequest.title: PromoteRequest
PromoteRequest.description: Body for promote/unpromote: graduate an account to/from the neurocomment pool.

ProxyCreate.title: ProxyCreate
ProxyCreate.description: Operator input when adding a proxy to the pool.

ProxyRead.title: ProxyRead
ProxyRead.description: A pool proxy as shown on the Accounts page (masked credentials).

RetryPairRequest.title: RetryPairRequest
RetryPairRequest.description: Operator retry of one (account, channel) challenge — the captcha «Решить».

SetAccountChannelRequest.title: SetAccountChannelRequest
SetAccountChannelRequest.description: Pin a campaign account to one channel; ``null`` clears the pin (all channels).

SetCampaignStatusRequest.title: SetCampaignStatusRequest
SetCampaignStatusRequest.description: Per-campaign run/pause: flip a campaign between ``active`` and ``paused`` (#148).

SolverToggleRequest.title: SolverToggleRequest
SolverToggleRequest.description: Turn the per-campaign challenge (captcha) solver on/off.

SpamStatusVerdict.title: SpamStatusVerdict
SpamStatusVerdict.description: Parsed, cacheable spam-status verdict for one account.

StartNeurocommentRequest.title: StartNeurocommentRequest
StartNeurocommentRequest.description: Start the fleet listener on the given account.

StartPhoneLoginRequest.title: StartPhoneLoginRequest
StartPhoneLoginRequest.description: API body for ``POST /accounts/start-login`` — provision an account by phone.

TdataImportResult.title: TdataImportResult
TdataImportResult.description:
Outcome of one :func:`services.accounts.sessions.import_account_tdata` call.

Wrapping the imported accounts in a model (instead of returning a raw
``list[AccountRead]``) keeps the service boundary Pydantic-only, leaves room
to add per-import metadata (counts, partial-failure summaries) without
breaking every call site, and matches the convention used by ``list_accounts``
and other multi-row reads.

UpdatePromptRequest.title: UpdatePromptRequest
UpdatePromptRequest.description: Replace a campaign's generation prompt (the edit-prompt modal).

WarmedAccount.title: WarmedAccount
WarmedAccount.description: A graduated (operator-promoted) account, for the warming page's warmed card.

WarmedAccountList.title: WarmedAccountList
WarmedAccountList.description: Wrapper for a bulk read of warmed accounts (non-negotiable #2).

WarmingAccountState.title: WarmingAccountState
WarmingAccountState.description: One account's warming status, rendered as a kanban card.

WarmingBoardState.title: WarmingBoardState
WarmingBoardState.description: Everything the warming page renders in one poll tick.

WarmingChannel.title: WarmingChannel
WarmingChannel.description: One channel the warming engine can join / read / react in.

WarmingReadiness.title: WarmingReadiness
WarmingReadiness.description:
Pre-start verdict for an account: can it safely begin warming?

``reasons`` is empty iff ``ready`` is True — each entry is a short,
human-readable blocker (``"session new"``, ``"no proxy"``, ``"no channels"``).

WarmingSettings.title: WarmingSettings
WarmingSettings.description: Masked, UI-facing warming settings — never carries the raw Gemini key.

WarmingSettingsUpdate.title: WarmingSettingsUpdate
WarmingSettingsUpdate.description:
Caller-supplied settings change from the UI.

``gemini_api_key`` semantics: ``None`` leaves the stored key untouched, an
empty string clears it, any other value replaces it. Same applies to
``gemini_model`` — ``None`` keeps current value, non-empty overrides.
An explicit ``clear_gemini_key`` flag is provided so the UI can clear the
stored key without ambiguity.

WarmingSummary.title: WarmingSummary
WarmingSummary.description: Fleet-level roll-up shown at the top of the warming page.
